note: Single source of truth for the alpha's live-slice section. The alpha points at ONE stable URL (BOHEMIA_CURRENT_SLICE.html); this manifest decides which slice that URL shows. Update the slice = bump 'current' + regen the loader (python3 tools/bohemia_slice_host.py). The alpha itself never changes. 'entries' stays short until the game ships, then it can become a real catalog.

entries.title: THE STREETS — V12
entries.note: Every tile native-baked, zero overlay. Four canonical cells from seed 12345 — markings, wrecked cars, fire barrels and dead lamps baked into the ground. Walk it; day/night runs live over the baked world.
